ddls:
CREATE TABLE "case_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported data */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the data was collected */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "total_positive_cases" INTEGER /* Total positive COVID-19 cases reported */,
  "positive_cases_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of positive cases out of total tests */,
  "positives_increase" INTEGER /* Increase in positive cases compared to previous day */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "testing_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of tests conducted compared to population */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the cases */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the cases */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the cases */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the cases */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_data" (
  "hospitalization_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported hospitalization data */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the data was collected */,
  "total_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalized COVID-19 patients */,
  "hospitalized_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of hospitalized cases compared to total positive cases */,
  "hospitalized_increase" INTEGER /* Increase in hospitalizations compared to previous day */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the hospitalized cases */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the hospitalized cases */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the hospitalized cases */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the hospitalized cases */,
  "critical_cases" INTEGER /* Number of critical cases (ICU admissions) */,
  "icu_capacity" INTEGER /* Total ICU capacity in the state */,
  "icu_occupancy" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds occupied by COVID-19 patients */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_data" (
  "death_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported death data */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the data was collected */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total COVID-19 related deaths */,
  "death_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of deaths compared to total positive cases */,
  "deaths_increase" INTEGER /* Increase in deaths compared to previous day */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the deceased */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the deceased */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the deceased */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the deceased */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_data_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "testing_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported testing data */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the data was collected */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "testing_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of tests conducted compared to population */,
  "tests_increase" INTEGER /* Increase in tests conducted compared to previous day */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the tested individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the tested individuals */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the tested individuals */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive tests */,
  "negative_tests" INTEGER /* Number of negative tests */,
  "pending_tests" INTEGER /* Number of pending tests */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health officer, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "table_accessed" TEXT /* Name of the table accessed (e.g., case_data, testing_data) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the intervention was applied */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., lockdown, mask mandate) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the intervention */,
  "effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the intervention */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination data */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the data was collected */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of vaccinated individuals compared to the population */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the vaccinated individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the vaccinated individuals */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the vaccinated individuals */,
  "dose_number" TEXT /* Number of doses administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "data_source_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of data source IDs used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., CDC, State Health Department) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., testing, hospitalization) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
